brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Start with the last hour. @timestamp:[now-1h to now] — brackets, to between the bounds. Limit to twenty so we can read it.

expected.sql: SELECT * FROM logs WHERE timestamp >= getvariable('ch8_anchor') - INTERVAL '1 hours' AND timestamp <= getvariable('ch8_anchor') LIMIT 20

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many. The LIMIT is 20. Only the last hour — @timestamp:[now-1h to now].'
Carol: 'Not enough. @timestamp:[now-1h to now] — open bracket, now-1h, to, now, close bracket.'
Carol: 'Query error. @timestamp:[now-1h to now] — that exact form. Brackets and all.'
Carol: '@timestamp:[now-1h to now] in the WHERE blank. Limit is already filled in.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: About a thousand rows. Normal background. Keep narrowing.
